name: Chicken Broth Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients together except the dried parsley until smooth.
2. Stir in the dried parsley and transfer the mixture to an airtight container.
Notes:
Use this seasoning to make a quick chicken-like stock out of water when you have no vegetable stock on hand. It's excellent for flavoring rice and as a soup base.
To make a simple gravy, mix water, seasoning, and miso (I prefer dark brown rice miso) in typical proportions: 1.5 cups water, 1 tablespoon seasoning, 2 teaspoons miso. Adjust seasonings to taste.
Before serving the gravy, mix some starch (such as potato starch) with a bit of water until well combined, then add it to the gravy over medium heat to thicken. Continue adding starch until you achieve the desired thickness.
